india_trends.title: LTM aims to double revenue to $10 billion by FY31, bets big on AI-led deals
india_trends.summary: The Mumbai-based company ended last year with $4.76 billion in revenue, up 6%. More than a third of this growth came from manufacturing and resources companies, which make up about a fifth of its revenue. Two years ago, LTM had outlined a goal to touch $10 billion revenue by FY32.

india_trends.title: Park Medi World stock surges 70% in 2026; analysts see rally sustaining on strong healthcare growth
india_trends.summary: Park Medi shares have surged 70% in 2026 so far, outperforming the market and pushing market cap over ₹10,000 crore. Analysts expect continued momentum due to the scalable healthcare model and strong demand.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Kissht listing becomes first big market test for digital lenders
india_trends.summary: Kissht parent OnEMI Tech listed on NSE at an 11% premium, becoming India's first meaningful public-market test for a pure-play app-led consumer lender.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Why India’s EV logistics push has a missing link, and what can fix it
india_trends.summary: India's logistics sector is rapidly adopting electric vehicles to cut costs and emissions, driven by government support and environmental concerns. However, the real challenge now lies in efficient fleet operations, not just vehicle deployment. Companies must master managing uptime, charging, and ro

india_trends.title: Banks see strong credit growth: RBI data reveals 16% deposit jump
india_trends.summary: Bank credit growth picked up pace to 16 percent in the fortnight ending April 30. Deposits saw a year-on-year growth of 12.3 percent. This marks an acceleration from the previous fortnight. Outstanding credit reached Rs 212.12 lakh crore. Deposits in the system stood at Rs 258.64 lakh crore. The cre

india_trends.title: Sebi ends market data ambiguity with uniform 30-day lag for educators
india_trends.summary: The new norms will come into effect from 1 July 2026.

india_trends.title: Niva Bupa Health Insurance Company Q4 Results: Profit surges 67% to Rs 345 crore
india_trends.summary: The company's total income during the quarter rose to Rs 2,078 crore against Rs 1,565 crore in the year-ago period, Niva Bupa Health Insurance said in a regulatory filing.

india_trends.title: India forex reserves drop $7.8 bn; rupee weakens to 94.47 against the dollar
india_trends.summary: India's foreign exchange reserves saw a significant drop of over seven billion dollars. This marks the second consecutive weekly fall. The Reserve Bank of India has been using these reserves to stabilize the currency market. The Indian Rupee also weakened against the US Dollar. Foreign currency asse

india_trends.title: US stocks today: US market opens higher after jobs data, chip stocks rebound
india_trends.summary: U.S. stocks surged at Friday's open, driven by a robust employment report that alleviated concerns about a cooling labor market. A rebound in chipmaker stocks further boosted investor sentiment, leading to gains across major indices. The Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq all saw significant increases in

india_trends.title: Bank of Baroda posts record Q4 profit despite higher provisions
india_trends.summary: Bank of Baroda reported a record Q4 net profit of Rs 5,616 crore, driven by higher net interest income and improved asset quality. Despite increased provisions, the bank strengthened balance sheet metrics, announced FY27 growth guidance and approved a Rs 6,000 crore capital raising plan

india_trends.title: Avi Polymers to acquire 90% stake in JVTR Consultants at Rs 500 crore valuation
india_trends.summary: Avi Polymers has approved the acquisition of a 90% stake in JVTR Consultants Pvt Ltd for Rs 500 crore via a share swap. This strategic move aims to expand the company's footprint in the technology and digital services sector, including IT services and software development. The acquisition aligns wit

india_trends.title: Titan Q4 profit jumps 35% as jewellery sales power growth
india_trends.summary: Titan reported a 35% rise in Q4 FY26 net profit to Rs 1,179 crore, driven by strong jewellery demand and premium watch sales. Revenue surged 46%, while expansion in India and overseas, including the Damas acquisition, strengthened Titan’s retail and international market presence.

india_trends.title: Blinkit, Instamart’s Q4 numbers show likely entry into normalization phase as growth moderates
india_trends.summary: Eternal and Swiggy flagged moderating quick commerce growth amid rising competition in Q4, even as demand stays strong. Analysts say discount-led expansion may reshape the industry’s path to profitability and long-term differentiation.

india_trends.title: Experts back OTC access to NRT across all formats and dosages, including 2 mg and 4 mg, as India struggles with a Tobacco quit success rate under 5%
india_trends.summary: The report highlights the significant economic burden of tobacco use, particularly among low-income households, and underscores how reducing consumption can lead to measurable improvements in household welfare and economic mobility.

india_trends.title: Sensex, Nifty fall as renewed Iran-US conflict clouds market sentiment - Business Standard
india_trends.summary: Sensex, Nifty fall as renewed Iran-US conflict clouds market sentiment    Business Standard

india_trends.title: US employers defy economic shock from Iran war and add a surprisingly strong 115,000 jobs in April
india_trends.summary: Average hourly earnings rose 0.2% from March and 3.6% from April 2025, consistent with the Federal Reserve's 2% inflation target.

india_trends.title: US stock market today: S&P 500, Nasdaq futures advance up to 0.7% despite Middle East tensions; crude rebounds
india_trends.summary: US stock futures showed a positive outlook on May 8, with S&amp;P 500 up 0.5% and Nasdaq 0.7%. Tensions in West Asia persist after clashes near the Strait of Hormuz. Strong tech earnings boost market optimism, though oil prices remain volatile amid geopolitical risks.

india_trends.title: Zepto's confidential IPO papers get Sebi approval, updated filing likely in 2 months
india_trends.summary: If Zepto's IPO goes through, it will mark one of the shortest journeys from launch to listing in India’s consumer internet market.

india_trends.title: Akasa Air establishes aircraft leasing unit at GIFT City, boosting India's aviation finance hub
india_trends.summary: Akasa Air has set up an aircraft leasing unit at Gujarat International Finance Tec-City. This move supports fleet expansion and aims to keep leasing business within India. Akasa joins other Indian carriers in utilizing GIFT City. This development is part of India's effort to build a domestic aviatio

india_trends.title: Sebi approves over $1 billion Zepto IPO; 5 other companies also get nod
india_trends.summary: Sebi has approved Zepto’s IPO, paving the way for a potential Rs 12,000 crore listing in 2026. The quick commerce startup aims to strengthen its position against rivals while signaling renewed investor confidence in India’s internet and startup listing market.
